findings: Live verification confirms the title, scientific name, family, all listed measurements, habitat/behavior summary, and field marks. The illustration matches an adult Common Raven: entirely black plumage, very heavy bill, thick neck with shaggy hackles, black eye/legs/feet, long narrow fingered wing, and wedge-shaped tail.
The plate shows one head, one beak, two anatomically consistent folded wings, two legs, and one tail; no anomalous or duplicated parts are visible.
No place name, ZIP code, coordinates, map, or local-observation detail appears.
